candidate_llm_application: LLM voice-routing counterpoint: route generation across 4-6 expert voices with independent melodic share; experts cross at specific spectral allocations.

results.title: Uncertain — Possibly Moe Expert Routing / Multi-Voice Generation: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on MoE expert routing / multi-voice generation, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (MoE expert routing / multi-voice generation); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (madrigal-counterpoint terms vs LLM terms).
